title: referrals — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — admin + marketing manage programs / codes / referrals / rewards / fraud-flags; users have no explicit permissions (own-referral routes are scoped to auth()->id() by policy). Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read + support intervention. All tenant permissions carry the appropriate resource prefix (`referral_programs.`, `referral_codes.`, `referrals.`, `referral_rewards.`, `referral_fraud_flags.`).

permissions.name: referral_programs.activate
permissions.description: Transition draft/paused -> active. Owner-approval reserved for launch.

permissions.name: referral_programs.archive
permissions.description: Terminal transition. Audit-critical. Cascades pending referrals + rewards.

permissions.name: referral_codes.create
permissions.description: Admin-generated campaign / opaque codes. User codes auto-issued (no permission needed).

permissions.name: referrals.force-vest
permissions.description: Enterprise-only admin override — additionally gated on `referrals_manual_override` entitlement at route middleware.

permissions.name: referral_rewards.clawback
permissions.description: Financial reversal. Audit-critical + notifies Finance module.

permissions.name: referral_fraud_flags.viewAny
permissions.description: Fraud data is sensitive — admin + support only.

permissions.name: referral_fraud_flags.review
permissions.description: Set disposition on a flag. Compliance-audited (7-year retention).

permissions.name: referral_fraud_flags.override
permissions.description: Enterprise-only. Manual override that permits a flagged referral to proceed. Requires `referrals_manual_override` entitlement.

permissions.name: platform.referrals.force-vest
permissions.description: Platform support intervention. Every fire notifies tenant admin + writes audit row 7-year retention.

permissions.name: platform.referral_rewards.force-clawback
permissions.description: Platform financial reversal. Escape hatch for regulator-issued clawbacks.
